title: eragrostis annulata
intro: Eragrostis annulata, also known as annual love grass, is a type of grass native to Africa and parts of Asia. Traditionally, Eragrostis annulata has been used in folk medicine, particularly in South Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Eragrostis annulata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used to make a powder or tincture for medicinal purposes.
